title: Welcome to the Global System of Trade Preferences
subtitle: A trade agreement designed by and for developing countries.
description: The GSTP is the largest preferential trade agreement among developing countries. Established in 1988, it expands South–South trade through preferential market access.
ni_description: Placeholder framing paragraph for the GSTP big picture — replace with the real narrative once content is finalized.
ni_def_statement_prefix: The Global System of Trade Preferences grants preferential tariff treatment among
ni_def_statement_suffix: participating developing countries, reducing tariffs on thousands of traded products.
ni_def_attribution: UNCTAD, Global System of Trade Preferences among Developing Countries.
